text: We do not write in order to be understood; we write in order to understand.
author: C. Day-Lewis

text: The best way to have a good idea is to have a lot of ideas.
author: Linus Pauling

text: I have no special talents. I am only passionately curious.
author: Albert Einstein

text: The tools we use shape the thoughts we think.
author: Marshall McLuhan

text: You can't connect the dots looking forward; you can only connect them looking backwards.
author: Steve Jobs

text: The purpose of computation is insight, not numbers.
author: Richard Hamming

text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
author: John Johnson
